topics.title: Phase 5 Progress Update
key_points: first UI panel added to Streamlit app
supporting_evidence: The structured outputs foundation has been implemented with task schemas, a registry, JSON parsing, and validation.
A first UI panel was added to the Streamlit app so users can run extraction, summary, checklist, and CV analysis.

payload.executive_summary: Phase 5 progress includes implementing a structured outputs foundation and adding a UI panel in the Streamlit app. However, prompt quality remains uneven.
key_insights: need to improve grounding and document-context usage
next milestone is to add an automated evaluation harness

payload.title: Project Release Candidate Preparation Checklist
payload.description: A comprehensive checklist to ensure all necessary steps are completed before approving a new project release candidate.

items.title: Verify Changelog
items.description: Ensure the changelog is up-to-date and accurate for the current version of the project.

items.title: Run Automated Tests
items.description: Execute all automated tests to ensure the project functions as expected without any issues.

items.title: Update Environment Examples
items.description: Review and update any environment examples to reflect the latest changes in the project.

items.title: Validate Streamlit Startup
items.description: Ensure the project starts up correctly using Streamlit and that all components are functioning as expected.

items.title: Check Structured Output Tasks
items.description: Verify that all structured output tasks are correctly implemented and tested.

items.title: Tag Release in Git
items.description: Create and tag the release in git to mark this version for future reference.

payload.snippet_summary: This code snippet includes two functions: normalize_scores and process. The first function normalizes scores in a list of items, ensuring they fall within the range [0, 100]. The second function processes these normalized scores to calculate an average.
payload.main_purpose: To normalize scores and compute their average while handling potential input issues.

detected_issues.title: Duplicated logic
detected_issues.description: Similar logic appears in multiple places.
detected_issues.evidence: Repeated conditional branches in two methods.

refactor_plan: Step 1: Extract the score normalization logic into a separate function.
Step 2: Update process to use this new helper function.
test_suggestions: Add unit test for edge case X (malformed input)
